title: Senior Software Engineer
jd_text:
About Us:
Nexonix Solutions is a leading innovator in cloud computing and AI-driven analytics. Our team is dedicated to delivering scalable, cutting-edge software products that transform businesses globally.

The Role:
We are seeking a Senior Software Engineer proficient in Java and AWS to join our dynamic engineering team. You will design, develop, and maintain our high-availability microservices infrastructure. Collaborating closely with product managers and DevOps, you will optimize system performance and drive automation.

Requirements:
- 5+ years experience in backend development with Java
- Strong knowledge of AWS cloud services including Lambda, EC2, and S3
- Experience with containerization (Docker, Kubernetes)
- Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and infrastructure as code
- Excellent problem-solving skills and teamwork orientation

Salary/Benefits:
- Competitive salary of $150,000 - $200,000
- Comprehensive health insurance
- Flexible working hours and remote options
- Stock options and annual bonuses

How to Apply:
Please submit your resume and cover letter via our careers page at www.nexonixsolutions.com/careers. We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Data Scientist
jd_text:
About Us:
Maple Analytics Inc. is a data-driven consultancy helping Fortune 500 clients harness the power of data science and machine learning to drive business insights and decision-making.

The Role:
We are looking for a Data Scientist with expertise in Python, R, and big data technologies such as Spark and Hadoop. You will analyze large datasets, build predictive models, and communicate findings to stakeholders.

Requirements:
- Master's degree in Statistics, Computer Science, or related field
- 3+ years experience in data science roles
- Proficiency in Python, R, SQL
- Experience with big data platforms (Spark, Hadoop)
- Strong communication and data visualization skills

Salary/Benefits:
- Salary: CAD $80,000 - $100,000
- Health and dental insurance
- Professional development budget
- Flexible work schedule

How to Apply:
Send your CV and portfolio to careers@mapleanalytics.ca. Please include examples of your work or GitHub repositories.

title: Frontend Developer
jd_text:
About Us:
EuroWeb Creations is a digital agency specializing in crafting responsive web applications for clients across Europe. Our culture embraces creativity, innovation, and collaboration.

The Role:
We seek a Frontend Developer experienced in React.js and TypeScript to build intuitive user interfaces. You will work closely with UX designers and backend engineers to deliver seamless digital experiences.

Requirements:
- 4+ years of frontend development experience
- Strong skills in React, TypeScript, and CSS3
- Familiarity with RESTful APIs and Git version control
- Passion for clean code and UI/UX best practices

Salary/Benefits:
- Competitive salary of €60,000 - €75,000
- Remote work possible within Europe
- Health insurance and wellness programs
- Paid vacation and flexible hours

How to Apply:
Please email your CV and portfolio to hr@eurowebcreations.de. Include links to projects or code samples.

title: DevOps Engineer
jd_text:
About Us:
CloudVista Technologies is revolutionizing cloud infrastructure management with innovative platform solutions that empower enterprise scalability and reliability.

The Role:
We are hiring a DevOps Engineer skilled in Kubernetes, Terraform, and Jenkins. You will automate deployment pipelines, manage cloud infrastructure, and ensure system integrity.

Requirements:
- 4+ years of DevOps or Site Reliability Engineering experience
- Expertise with Kubernetes and container orchestration
- Proficiency in Terraform and infrastructure as code
- Experience with CI/CD tools such as Jenkins or GitLab CI

Salary/Benefits:
- Salary: $90,000
- Health, dental, and vision insurance
- 401(k) matching
- Remote-friendly environment

How to Apply:
Submit your application via our website at www.cloudvista.com/careers with your resume and cover letter.

title: Full Stack Developer
jd_text:
About Us:
BrightPath Innovations is a startup focused on building scalable SaaS platforms for the education sector. We value agility, creativity, and user-centric design.

The Role:
We’re looking for a Full Stack Developer proficient in Node.js, React, and MongoDB. You will build new features, maintain existing codebases, and collaborate with cross-functional teams.

Requirements:
- 3+ years experience with JavaScript frameworks
- Strong backend skills with Node.js and Express
- Experience with React and frontend state management
- Knowledge of MongoDB or similar NoSQL databases

Salary/Benefits:
- Competitive salary range $110,000 - $130,000
- Stock options and performance bonuses
- Flexible work hours and remote options
- Health insurance benefits

How to Apply:
Please forward your resume and GitHub link to hiring@brightpathinnovations.com.

title: Cybersecurity Analyst
jd_text:
About Us:
Maple Secure Networks provides cutting-edge cybersecurity solutions to protect enterprises from evolving digital threats. Our team is passionate about security and innovation.

The Role:
We are hiring a Cybersecurity Analyst to monitor security events, conduct vulnerability assessments, and support incident response.

Requirements:
- 2+ years experience in cybersecurity operations
- Knowledge of SIEM tools like Splunk or QRadar
- Familiarity with network protocols and security frameworks
- Strong analytical and investigative skills

Salary/Benefits:
- Salary: $105,000 CAD
- Comprehensive health benefits
- Training and certification support
- Flexible working arrangements

How to Apply:
Send your CV and cover letter to careers@maplesecure.ca.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
jd_text:
About Us:
InnoVision AI is a pioneer in developing AI-powered solutions for healthcare diagnostics. Our team blends domain expertise with advanced machine learning techniques.

The Role:
Seeking a Machine Learning Engineer skilled in Python, TensorFlow, and cloud computing. You will build and deploy models to improve diagnostic accuracy.

Requirements:
- MSc or PhD in Computer Science or related field
- 3+ years ML development experience
- Proficient in Python, TensorFlow, and cloud platforms (GCP or AWS)
- Strong understanding of data preprocessing and model evaluation

Salary/Benefits:
- Salary: €80,000
- Health insurance and pension plans
- Flexible working hours
- Professional development budget

How to Apply:
Apply by sending your resume and cover letter to hr@innovisionai.nl.

title: Product Manager - SaaS
jd_text:
About Us:
ClearStream Technologies delivers SaaS solutions that streamline business communications worldwide. We pride ourselves on innovation and customer success.

The Role:
We are looking for a Product Manager with experience in SaaS platforms and agile methodologies. You will own product roadmaps, gather requirements, and coordinate releases.

Requirements:
- 5+ years in product management for SaaS
- Strong stakeholder management and communication skills
- Experience with Agile and Scrum
- Technical understanding of cloud-based services

Salary/Benefits:
- Salary: €65,000 - €75,000
- Health insurance and wellness programs
- Remote working options
- Annual bonus and stock options

How to Apply:
Please email your CV and cover letter to jobs@clearstream.ie.

title: Sales Executive (Tech)
jd_text:
About Us:
BrightEdge Solutions is a fast-growing software company specializing in CRM and marketing automation tools tailored for SMEs across Europe.

The Role:
We are seeking a Sales Executive with a strong track record in B2B technology sales. You will manage the full sales cycle and build relationships with new clients.

Requirements:
- Proven sales experience in tech/software sector
- Excellent communication and negotiation skills
- Target-driven and self-motivated
- Familiarity with CRM systems

Salary/Benefits:
- On-target earnings: £80k
- Comprehensive commission structure
- Company pension and private healthcare
- Flexible working hours and remote options

How to Apply:
Send your CV and cover letter to recruitment@brightedgesolutions.co.uk.

title: Business Development Manager
jd_text:
About Us:
NextGen Tech Partners is a consultancy specializing in digital transformation services for the retail sector.

The Role:
We are recruiting a Business Development Manager to identify and secure new business opportunities, develop client relationships, and contribute to growth strategies.

Requirements:
- 4+ years experience in business development in tech
- Strong networking and presentation skills
- Ability to work independently and in teams

Salary/Benefits:
- OTE £92,000
- Performance bonuses
- Pension scheme and healthcare
- Training and career development

How to Apply:
Please apply via our website at www.nextgentechpartners.com/careers.

title: Technical Account Manager
jd_text:
About Us:
CloudSphere Services provides managed cloud solutions to enterprise clients, enabling seamless migration and ongoing support.

The Role:
We need a Technical Account Manager to act as the liaison between clients and engineering teams, ensuring successful cloud deployments and customer satisfaction.

Requirements:
- Experience in technical account management or customer success
- Knowledge of cloud platforms like Azure or AWS
- Excellent communication and problem-solving skills

Salary/Benefits:
- OTE of £75,000
- Bonus schemes
- Flexible working arrangements
- Company pension and health benefits

How to Apply:
Send your CV with a cover letter to careers@cloudsphere.co.uk.

title: IT Project Manager (Contract)
jd_text:
About Us:
GreenTech Innovations is a consultancy focused on delivering sustainable IT solutions to clients across multiple sectors.

The Role:
We are offering a contract IT Project Manager role to oversee software development projects, coordinate stakeholders, and ensure delivery on time and budget.

Requirements:
- Proven experience managing IT projects
- PRINCE2 or PMP certification preferred
- Strong organisational and communication skills

Salary/Benefits:
- Day rate of £500-£700
- Remote work flexibility
- Opportunity to work on green technology initiatives

How to Apply:
Please send your CV and availability to contracts@greentechinnovations.co.uk.

title: Cloud Solutions Architect (Contract)
jd_text:
About Us:
Skyline Tech Consultants deliver expert cloud architecture and consultancy for enterprise clients seeking digital transformation.

The Role:
We are seeking a Cloud Solutions Architect on a contract basis to design scalable cloud infrastructures, advise on best practices, and lead technical workshops.

Requirements:
- Extensive experience with AWS or Azure architecture
- Strong communication and leadership skills
- Proven track record with enterprise cloud projects

Salary/Benefits:
- £600 per day
- Flexible remote working
- Exciting projects in finance and healthcare sectors

How to Apply:
Forward your CV and references to recruitment@skylinetech.co.uk.

title: Mobile App Developer
jd_text:
About Us:
Pangea Digital creates innovative mobile applications for lifestyle and fitness industries, focusing on user engagement and seamless experiences.

The Role:
We are looking for a Mobile App Developer experienced in Swift and Kotlin to develop cross-platform mobile apps with high performance and usability.

Requirements:
- 3+ years developing iOS and Android apps
- Proficient in Swift, Kotlin, and RESTful APIs
- Experience with mobile UI/UX best practices

Salary/Benefits:
- Competitive salary of $120,000
- Health insurance and 401(k)
- Flexible working hours and remote options

How to Apply:
Apply by submitting your resume and portfolio to jobs@pangeadigital.com.

title: UX/UI Designer
jd_text:
About Us:
VividWave Studios is a creative agency specializing in user experience and interface design for web and mobile applications across diverse industries.

The Role:
We are seeking a UX/UI Designer skilled in Figma, Adobe XD, and user research to create engaging and accessible digital products.

Requirements:
- 4+ years experience in UX/UI design
- Strong portfolio demonstrating user-centered design
- Proficiency in design and prototyping tools
- Ability to conduct user testing and analyze results

Salary/Benefits:
- Salary: €70,000
- Health and social benefits
- Flexible working hours and remote options

How to Apply:
Email your CV, portfolio, and cover letter to hr@vividwave.fr.
